theme_builder_area=”post_content” sticky_enabled=”0″][/et_pb_heading][et_pb_text _builder_version=”4.27.5″ _module_preset=”default” text_text_color=”#FFFFFF” hover_enabled=”0″ global_colors_info=”{}” theme_builder_area=”post_content” sticky_enabled=”0″]

At Design Flash, we’re more than just a design agency in Bangalore — we’re your visual branding partner. With years of creative and industry experience, we help startups, small businesses, and established brands build a strong and consistent visual identity that connects with their audience.

Our team combines creative thinking with strategic design to deliver impactful logo design, web graphics, banners, and social media creatives tailored to your brand goals. Whether you want to build brand recognition, improve engagement, or strengthen your online presence, we create designs that truly represent your business.

We believe great design is not just about looks — it’s about communication and performance. That’s why our designs focus on clarity, consistency, and brand messaging, ensuring your visuals work effectively across websites, social media platforms, ads, and marketing campaigns.

Over the years, we’ve worked with businesses across multiple industries, helping them stand out with professional graphics that drive attention, trust, and engagement in a competitive digital space.

If you’re ready to elevate your brand visuals, Design Flash is here to bring your ideas to life with creative designs that make a lasting impression — across every digital touchpoint.

Quick Tips

You can learn more from our asked questions

[/et_pb_text][et_pb_accordion _builder_version=”4.27.2″ toggle_font=”Poppins||||||||” closed_toggle_font=”Poppins||||||||” body_font=”||||||||” custom_padding=”||||false|false” custom_css_free_form=”#dct_faq_v1 .et_pb_accordion .et_pb_toggle h5.et_pb_toggle_title:after {display:none;}||#dct_faq_v1 .et_pb_accordion .et_pb_toggle {margin-left:0px!important;}” global_colors_info=”{}” theme_builder_area=”post_content”][et_pb_accordion_item title=”What types of graphic design services do you offer?” open=”on” _builder_version=”4.27.2″ global_colors_info=”{}” theme_builder_area=”post_content”]

We offer a full range of graphic design services, including logo design, branding, print design, social media graphics, web banners, infographics, packaging design, and more. Whether you need digital or print solutions, we’ve got you covered.

[/et_pb_accordion_item][et_pb_accordion_item title=”How long does it take to complete a graphic design project?” _builder_version=”4.27.2″ global_colors_info=”{}” theme_builder_area=”post_content” open=”off”]

The timeline for each project depends on its complexity. Logo designs typically take 1-2 weeks, while larger branding or web design projects may take 3-4 weeks. We work closely with you to ensure timely delivery.

[/et_pb_accordion_item][et_pb_accordion_item title=”Can you create a custom design based on my brand guidelines?” _builder_version=”4.27.2″ global_colors_info=”{}” theme_builder_area=”post_content” open=”off”]

Yes, we specialize in creating designs that align with your brand identity. If you have existing guidelines, we will ensure all our designs are consistent with your brand’s aesthetic and tone.

[/et_pb_accordion_item][et_pb_accordion_item title=”How much do your graphic design services cost?” _builder_version=”4.27.2″ global_colors_info=”{}” theme_builder_area=”post_content” open=”off”]

Our pricing varies depending on the scope of the project. We offer competitive rates and can provide a custom quote after discussing your specific design needs. Contact us for more details.

[/et_pb_accordion_item][et_pb_accordion_item title=”Can you help with rebranding?” _builder_version=”4.27.2″ global_colors_info=”{}” theme_builder_area=”post_content” open=”off”]

Definitely! Whether you’re looking to refresh your current brand or undergo a complete rebranding, we can assist with everything from new logos to updated brand collateral and marketing materials.

[/et_pb_accordion_item][/et_pb_accordion][/et_pb_column][/et_pb_row][/et_pb_section]
